name: -base / -raw / -pretrain / -pt
oneliner: No instruction tuning. Next-token prediction only. The starting point for fine-tuning. Google uses -pt, others use -base or no suffix.
explanation: Some repos omit suffix for base (Llama 3.1 has no suffix for base, adds -Instruct for tuned). Google Gemma uses -pt. Functionally: generates completions, not conversations.

resources.label: HuggingFace model hub (base vs instruct naming)
